reviews.ownerResponse: While we empathize with our former client, Pablo Galvan, regarding the serious nature of his injuries and the limited compensation allowed under the law ($15,000 minimal liability limits in California), The fact remains that La Injury Attorneys secured Defendant's entire policy limits after conducting its due diligence to seek other sources of recovery as well as employing an asset search company to research Defendant's assets. Mr. Galvan received maximum compensation afforded under the law while receiving a large discount in attorney fees and considerable assistance and guidance. This scenario is a no win situation for any California law firm who is confronted with a Defendant with minimal limits and insufficient assets to cover Plaintiff's total damages.

reviews.text: I saw a TikTok on this company and reached out to get a consultation for a wrongful termination lawsuit against my previous employer. The receptionist kept saying my paperwork is still in review and it had been weeks since with ZERO communication. I was the one reaching out. Why waste my time with me submitting all of the paperwork if no one is actually reviewing it. SEEMS LIKE A LOT OF SMOKE AND NO ACTIONS. This is why law firms have a bad reputation!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Astrid,

We DO NOT handle wrongful termination cases; we represent sexual assault survivors and personal injury victims. Accordingly, you must have mistakenly left this review here when it is in fact meant for another law firm. Since you are not referencing a personal experience you have had with our business, we would appreciate you removing this review, as it violates Google’s policies. Thank you, and we wish you all the best.

Sincerely,

Dordulian Law Group

reviews.text: Terrible customer service. They show now compassion and can’t answer simple questions. They’re only interested in getting the most money out of someone.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Ms. Wise,

We’re very sorry to hear that your experience was unsatisfactory. As our Intake Specialist stated on the phone, we declined to represent you, but never expressed that your claim didn’t have merit. Civil law can have some unfortunate limitations, and a number of factors related to the information you provided made it impossible for a claim to be pursued on your behalf. In civil claims, even if the merits of the case are strong, a defendant without any assets means the plaintiff would never be able to recover any type of settlement or verdict, including financial damages. Even a $10 million judgment in a jury trial could lead to a $0 recovery for a plaintiff if the defendant does not have assets to “go after.” Again, we’re very sorry that these unfortunate circumstances caused you to have an unsatisfactory experience. We wish you all the best.

Sincerely,

The D Law Group Team
Thanks so much for your 5-star review, Omar!

reviews.text: Literally the worst communication and experience I ever had, promises you that you have an easy case and here we are with no updates and just more money for them smh 🤦
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear James R:

We’re sorry to hear that you had a bad experience, but it appears you may have mistaken Dordulian Law Group with another law firm. We do not have any clients that match your first name and last initial. Additionally, we only work on a contingency fee basis (meaning we make no money until after settling a client’s case).

In fact, if we don’t win, we don’t get paid. Therefore, your comment about “just more money for them” again does not seem to apply to our firm.

Could you please double-check your main point of contact on your case? Although our website/emails are from DLawGroup.com, our actual name is Dordulian Law Group.

Best of luck,

The Dordulian Law Group Team

reviews.text: Attorney Sarah Schlehr was referred to me and I am so grateful. Attorney Sarah Schlehr was  a beacon of hope to me at a time when my options appeared limited and the likelihood of a satisfactory resolution seemed highly impossible. Not only was she able to defend me from an unjust situation, her calm and empathetic demeanor offered emotional succor to myself and those I care about most. My family and I are eternally grateful for her service and I hereby recommend Attorney Schlehr without reservation.

Sarah was a miracle find. She was a referral by another attorney who was a friend of a friend of mine. Prior to meeting with Sarah, I had called a few employment attorney's who wanted to take my case. It was odd to have attorneys talk over the phone for 10 minutes and without seeing any evidence or meeting you in person, say, "I'll send you a retainer."

I met with Sarah in person, discussed the issues I had at my previous employment, and after some deliberation Sarah informed me that she would take my case on contingency. The fact that she wanted to know all the details, took the time to investigate, and most importantly listened made me feel I had met the right "match."

It took us almost 4 years of litigation and a two week trial to win the case. There was never any false hopes or false promises made. Sarah would talk about winning and the potential for losing at trial if I decided to go to trial instead of accept any pre-trial settlements.

It was my relationship with the Schlehr Firm which inspired me to pursue my own legal career. I saw an educated, powerful, woman who didn't let anything slip by her. Sarah has years of experience, a sharp eye, and an iron will to fight your case. Needless to say it is very inspiring to work with Sarah and her associates. You will feel taken care off, important, and most of all like you achieved justice for your cause.

I was extremely happy with my experience and referred a friend to Sarah so that she may have the same expert on her case. It is vital to have a diligent and honest attorney to inform you whether your case is one worth litigating or not. Litigation is not an easy process as a plaintiff, it may be emotionally taxing to some, stressful, and cause lots of self-doubt. But, when you have someone on your side who understands that, knows how to ease your concerns through actions on the case, and is human enough to check in-- then there is not much to worry about in the long run. The journey with Sarah, in retrospect, was life changing.

Sarah and her team were the answer to my prayers. I was someone initially very against legal action. But, I found myself up against a wall and needed justice for my new little family and me. This is a LONG process and Sarah and her team were always there walking me through everything and making sure I was okay. After struggling to get responses from other firms, we were referred to Iman Jaffrey—and it was the best thing that could have happened for our case. Because many firms don't handle restraining orders, finding someone with Iman's expertise and dedication was a game-changer.

He recognized the urgency of our situation immediately. Iman actually worked through the Christmas holiday, communicating with us several times on Christmas Day to secure a temporary restraining order. His commitment to his clients is truly "above and beyond." On February 9th, Iman represented us in court, and thanks to his diligent preparation, we were granted a 5-year Civil Harassment restraining order. If you need an attorney who is professional, attentive, and incredibly responsive, Iman is the one you want in your corner.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing this. We know how stressful and urgent these situations can be, and it means a lot to hear that you felt supported during such an important time.

Restraining order cases often move quickly and require immediate attention. We’re glad Iman was able to step in when you needed help and work diligently to secure both the temporary order and the 5-year Civil Harassment Restraining Order.

Your trust in our office is something we don’t take lightly. We truly appreciate you taking the time to write this and wish you continued safety and peace ahead.

Iman handled a restraining order case involving my neighbor.  It involved harassment for over 4 years and had a lot of details.  Iman listened to and read all of the evidence I had collected over the years.  Iman crafted a winning legal strategy to present to the court.

Iman presented himself VERY respectfully to the judge.  The judge complimented Iman for his professionalism in open court.
EVERYONE would want Iman standing next to them in court.  EVERYONE!

Iman effectively negotiated with my irrational, dope smoking PSYCHO neighbor and reached a settlement.

Attorney David Issapour

reviews.text:
Grit, Honesty, and Dedication You Can Count On

I’ve been represented by Scott Clarke for the past few years, and I can honestly say he’s been one of the most dependable and committed professionals I’ve worked with. From the very beginning, he was upfront, transparent, and deeply invested in making sure I understood the legal road ahead. He never gave false hope—just real, honest insight and consistent updates that helped me feel prepared every step of the way.

What I’ve come to admire most about Scott is how hard he fights. It doesn’t matter who’s on the other side—judges, attorneys, social workers, or doctors—Scott holds his ground and speaks up for his client. He takes his work personally in the best way possible, and you can feel that when he shows up to advocate for you, whether it’s in court or behind the scenes.

He’s organized, sharp, and has a calm confidence that gives you a sense of peace even during chaotic moments. No matter how tough things got, I never felt alone in the process because I knew he was handling it with care and focus.

If you’re looking for someone who is both a strong legal mind and a reliable human being—Scott’s the real deal.

I wasted $8000 on these people to participate in a couple remote hearings, review some documents, and to hear them make promises they never kept. Literally, no progress was made that I couldn’t have done myself. They wanted more money just to schedule a meeting with opposing counsel – which they claimed to be doing for weeks and never succeeded. The lack of ethics and morals, pure lies, and unkept promises made me question their unfair billing – and that pissed them off. I guess they’re not going to be able to take that vacation or buy that new car on profits from me! You have been warned.

RUN-A-WAY!!! This law firm was the worst I've ever dealt with. Mr. Clarke carries himself like a gambler. And will gamble with your case, so he can charge retainer after retainer. They had no idea what was going on in my case. He kept saying my ex with the drug problem. She was arrested multiple times for DV, including with a gun. But let's go over the other things. 1) Never ever return phone calls or emails. Like never ever. 2) Never put up a defence in court. Just sat there in silence and let lies woe the judge/minors council. 3) charged $1300 for a response, that wasn't even done near in time, and we showed up to court looking like idiots with nothing to back us up. They (Mr. Clarke) decided it was fair I only pay half of it since it wasn't present in court. I don't think it was sent to court. I got it late evening the night before court. 4) put no defence together. I had to rush my son to the childrens hospital after a visit with there mom, and we somehow can't  and didn't properly bring it up. Along with other instance, that I was very clear and contacted my lawyer during everything. 5) Never kept in contact with minors council like said. 6) said I needed to pay more to get this divorce wrapped up. Charged me for papers, and all of that was already in the courts, from me in 2001. They never even looked over my case to see where it was. They just wanted to charge another $1500, even though we are in the middle of the steps for the divorce to be finished. Nothing they woulda done wrapped it up any faster. And a look over the whole case in the begining woulda told them that.
I could go on, and on. But il finish with their want for money is so bad, that when I told them I wanted to go a different direction, and seeing threw the lies. And Mr Clarke repeatedly telling me I had to pay $1500 with in the hr. (Especially to find that $1500 was a lie because they had to wait for the process just like I am now,) to charge me for their 30 mins conversation. It just shows that this place just wants your money. Not to represent you. If you look at other places for reviews, you find the truth. I now owe them money because I said I was going a different direction. When it was a conversation to see what direction was best for all.

I reached out to the offices of Fusco and Clarke because my boyfriend was served with Child Support documents and we had no idea what our first steps to take would be for a situation like that.
Their receptionist Linda was very nice, listened to all our concerns and offered a consultation. I would 100% recommend them to anyone in need or guidance of an attorney for their Family Law concerns.

I had a very difficult case that lasted many years. Cynthia was my attorney. She did a great job getting my case settled in as  timely of a manner, at a reasonable cost. She was always available whenever I had any questions. I highly recommend this firm.
I think the best thing is honest. More importantly justice through the system. Thank you won full custody ❤️ Very difficult case
Great at what they do!
They handled my adoption for my granddaughter. It was a very difficult time in my life and very stressful,  but having a good attorney helped alot. I highly recommend them.

I got into an accident and insurance was disputing liability. My original attorney was pushing me to settle for like $4,000, Derik came in and got them to pay nearly 9x that within 3 and a half months. thank you, you’re the best!!

When you're working with DAS Law LA you're working with the best! Derik is on top of everything and goes the extra mile, he treats you like family and works hard to get you everything you deserve. I know I'll never need to look for another lawyer again and recommend him to anyone who asks.

So first I want to start off with thanking the guys at DAS Law Group for all great work they do and for making one feel like they truly are being represented. This is the second time I have the pleasure of working with DAS law group, and let me tell ya, they exceed all expectations every time! The first time my bf and I had got into a collision, and we thought we had a slam dunk case since we were the obvious victims and had a police report to back us. We didn't feel like we needed an attorney, but boy, were we wrong! Before we knew it, the ones responsible for the whole accident had hired an attorney and were trying to weasel us out of our settlement check. That's when we contacted Chris late into the case, and he was our knight in shining armor. He managed to get us what we deserved despite being late into the case. Fast-forward a year later, I unfortunately got hit in a shopping plaza. Taking the lessons I learned from the last accident, I wasted no time in contacting law group. That's when Chris connected me with his extraordinary associate, Derik, and I couldn't be more thankful for it!! The person hit me attempted to pull a fast one on us but Derik wasn't having any of it. He quickly found a solution to our dilemma and was able to get me treatment for my injuries and just compensation. The whole experience was nerve wrecking but Derik's professionalism and commitment to help those in need was very soothing and reassuring. Despite their growth and popularity as law group, they're always very committed and happy to take a quick call to let you know where you're at in the process. I know sometimes it can be frustrating because it's a lengthy process , but rest assured that your wait is worth while with DAS law group. They truly are the best at what they do. I recommend law group to anyone looking for top-notch attorneys that are about protecting their clients. All my family members are now loyal clients for any future accidents that may occur. I am happy to say that I can drive comfortably knowing that if anything arises on the road, I have a law group on my side! Once again, thank you so much for everything you do!

If you you are looking for expert legal advice call Derik. One of the things that sets DAS apart from other law firms is his level of experience and knowledge in handling motor vehicle accident cases. He took a hands-on approach to my case, carefully assessing the evidence and building a strong legal strategy to achieve the best possible outcome.

Derik was committed to providing personalized attention and support. He knows that every case is unique and requires a customized approach, tailored to meet the client's specific needs and objectives.
He goes the extra mile for his clients. He knows that dealing with the aftermath of a car accident can be a challenging and stressful time, which is why he provides a comprehensive legal service. He handled everything from filing paperwork and negotiating with insurance companies to representing us in court if necessary.

In short, if you are looking for a law firm that you can trust to provide expert legal advice and support in your case, look no further than DAS.

Working with DAS law has been a wonderful experience. Derik has been very professional, very caring and confident along the entire process. He got me more money in my settlement than I ever expected. I can’t recommend him enough.

I recently had the pleasure of referring a personal injury case to Derik, and I must say I was blown away by his exceptional performance. From the very beginning, Derik showed a deep understanding of the case and handled it with the utmost care and professionalism.

His communication skills were top-notch, and he kept my client informed every step of the way, making sure they were fully aware of the legal process and any updates on their case. Derik's has a rare ability to combine a thorough knowledge of the law with excellent negotiation skills, which allowed him to secure a settlement that was beyond my client's expectations.

It was a true pleasure working with Derik, and I would not hesitate to refer him to anyone in need of a top-notch personal injury attorney. He is dedicated, knowledgeable, and above all, he truly cares about his clients. I have no doubt that he will continue to excel in this field and provide the highest level of representation to those in need.

I'm really glad I turned to Derik when I did. I did not realize until too late that I had a leak under my sink which ended up causing way more damage than I thought. I didn't know what to do... whether I should get insurance involved, or try to handle things on my own. Once I got in touch with Derik, he calmed me down and took over the whole process. With no effort on my part, he was able to get my insurance company to pay for all necessary repairs. A true life saver.

Derik knows what he is doing and he’ll explain the entire process to you, and what you can expect from the insurance company and defense attorneys. He said he used to work as one. He is a great litigator and very aggressive. He is also very responsive. He’ll give you his cell phone number and can be reached at anytime. Highly recommend!
Would highly recommend, great lawyer!

Derik is an amazing lawyer, couldn’t recommend him enough! Having him on your side makes you feel protected and cared for no matter what situation you’re in. He is like a wealth of knowledge on matters you would never expect ranging from medical injuries to treatment plans to insurance protocol. He also is able to connect you with the best resources and is always incredibly responsive and personable. He truly fights tooth and nail on your behalf, more than any lawyer ever would. Derik was wonderful to work with. Knowledgeable, exercised patience, and added humanity to the situation I was in. I would highly recommend Derik.

I was seriously rear ended on the Pasadena side of the 110 North freeway. My friend recommended Derik at DAS Law LA. Derik made the legal process so easy! He immediately instructed me not to talk to anyone, including MY insurance company. He did all the work! He called and checked up on me every week during the lawsuit. Do yourself a favor and ask for Derik when you call!

I reached out to Derik regarding a work related injury and he got back to me very quickly and told me to come in for a free consultation to discuss the case and get me the compensation and treatment needed with the right doctors. I’ll forever be grateful to DAS LAW and Derik for taking care of me and keeping me updated every step of the way. Thank you Derik!

I’m writing this review on behalf of my father who was rear ended by a Jeep at speeds of nearly 30 miles per hour while he was waiting at the light at an exit on the 110 freeway. He didn’t see it coming and it really shocked him and caused him really bad pain throughout his neck and back. He also missed some time from work. He runs a business, so his absence was detrimental to the company. The insurance was refusing to pay for any of those damages and was claiming that it was “too speculative,” but Derik was able to prove otherwise. He had told us he has great experience defending these insurance companies in the past and that he knew how to get around their arguments. He came off as a knowledgeable lawyer, and was really adamant about getting money for the harm they caused. He got him the treatment he needed to get back up on his feet and back to work. He got him a great settlement, which not only included his injuries injuries but also the loss of business income that they were initially disputing!  He brought in a great expert to help support our claim. Thank you!!

I chose Haleh's Law Office to represent me after reading glowing reviews about their services, but unfortunately, my experience was far from what I expected. Initially, I was hopeful, especially after they took on my case, but as time passed, I became increasingly frustrated with the lack of communication and poor service.

For nearly two years, I received no updates, no phone calls, no emails—nothing. It felt as though my case was being completely ignored. Over the course of my case, I had at least five different case managers, each of whom seemed to forget to contact me at the correct phone number, despite me calling twice to update them with my information. On top of that, there were several scheduling issues. I was booked for appointments I had already attended, and once, they even scheduled an unnecessary appointment, waited 2 hours  only for Haleh's office to tell me it had been canceled when I informed them i showed up and waited but the office never opened. This lack of communication and organization made it difficult to trust the team handling my case.

I tried reaching out to express my concerns, but my emails went unanswered. It felt like my case just wasn’t a priority for them. After five years of waiting, I finally received my settlement in the mail—but there was no follow-up from the office. No explanation, no acknowledgment, just a check in the envelope.

Overall, I was extremely dissatisfied with the service I received. I honestly feel that my case wasn’t given the attention it deserved, and had I worked with a more responsive team, I might have secured a better settlement. While the initial reviews were promising, my personal experience was far from satisfactory.

reviews.text:
Looking for a lawyer who will vanish faster than your ex after payday? Congratulations, you’ve found the right firm. They told me I had a case in March 2025, and here we are in September—still waiting for their grand return call (must be coming by carrier pigeon). I’ve left enough voicemails to fill a podcast, but apparently, answering clients isn’t part of their legal strategy. Professionalism? Courtesy? Nope. Just radio silence and a masterclass in how not to run a law office. Honestly, if this place calls itself a law firm, then I’m the Queen of England. Do yourself a favor—go find actual lawyers, not these clowns in suits.

9/10/2025 - Responding to Alder Law’s lies:

Alder Law claims they “tried to explain why they couldn’t take my case.” Fascinating — considering they never actually contacted me. No call. No voicemail. No email. No text. Nothing. Just silence….until now, when they decided to rewrite history to save face.

Let’s be clear. I reached out multiple times. I was ignored. And rather than take responsibility for that, Alder Law is now pushing a false narrative to cover their own lack of professionalism. That’s not just lazy — it’s deceptive!!

For a law firm, that kind of conduct is especially alarming. If this is how you handle basic communications, I can only imagine how you handle real legal matters. I’ve documented every ignored messages, every missed opportunity to do the right thing, and now, this convenient lie. Clients deserves better — and the public deserves to know exactly what kind of firm they’re dealing with.
reviews.ownerResponse: Kimmie, we are sorry you had this experience that led you here.   Sometimes the facts of a case don’t support a claim.    We did our best to explain this.     We wish you all the best!

Customer Service

I was hit by an SUV while walking in 2021.   Mr Raven told me he could get me over $100,000. Without going to court he knew I didn’t want to go to court  He said he could negotiate with insurance companies so that I wouldn’t have to pay them any money. It wasn’t until mid 2024, that Ted fully explained-that insurance companies can demand  money back when you use your insurance when you’ve had an accident.And I started getting bills from my insurance co in 2022.  I even had to pay interest! I had to send him my information more than once as his Assistant misplaced the documents that I originally sent. And he dropped the ball. There were some follow-up visits that were necessary for me to have explaining how the damage to one leg impacted my ability to walk and resulted in me, needing to have surgery on the other leg, and also exacerbated the original leg injured by being hit by the SUV.  He’s very unorganized and when he and if your cases isn’t worth a lot of money, he’ll stop communicating with you wound up with $16,000. He wound up with $22. He charges 45% and we had talked about him not taking 45% given the errors that he made, but he still charged me 45%, because he said he had to file the case in court, but we never went to court. He only agreed to reduce it to just 40% if I didn’t post my negative review. So beware, there may be lots of positive reviews but I guarantee you he negotiated to avoid the negative ones. I would just stay away. He's not organized  And he’s not honest.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. "Goldstein," we take criticism very seriously. You are not and have never been a client at this law firm. You threatened a negative review in an attempt to extort money from us. All of your other reviews seem to be the same.

I was in an accident in April 2024. The entire time, I had to check status because there was no one was reaching out to me. I retained Russ Brown because we were in a motorcycle accident and thought they would be able to assist us to the best of their ability. The first 2 calls they made us feel special after that it was unbelievable. I truly believe if I had went elsewhere, my pay out would have been more than 6k. I was a rider on a bike, the driver who hit us made an illegal left turn crashing into us.

After 10+ years of riding, there finally come a point where I could use some legal advice - and I am glad RussBrown Motorcycle Attorneys were there for me when that happened.

I was in a fairly complex situation where I wanted to understand better the leverage I may or may not have. Not being well versed into the legalities of things, I wanted someone that would be able to give me a straight and simple answer, while also taking the time to hear my story and concerns.
I got very quickly connected with Chuck, one of the main attorneys at Russ Brown. We had a 45 minutes conversation on the phone where he took the time to hear me out and then started to give me pointers. Then, to my surprise, he said that he would like to sleep on it and suggested to hold a second call the following day where he could give me more detailed answers.
I was very appreciative of this, as it was clear he cared about me and my case.
I called him back the next day and we talked for another 30 minutes. I could really feel that Chuck was trying to find the best answers for me, looking at my case from many different POVs, suggesting different strategies etc.
As I had been alone in this process so far, it felt good to have him on board with me for these 2 conversations. It felt more like discussing with a partner than with a lawyer in a way, and I appreciated that very much.

After these 2 convos, I left with a clear understanding of my case and a strategic roadmap on how to go forward, which is exactly what I needed.
Thank you Chuck and the RB team!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Sébastien. We're glad Chuck was able to provide clarity, support, and a solid path forward. That's the level of care we offer every rider. We're always here if you need us, ride safe!

Cohen Law Partners GREAT, especially for cyclists.

My story:
So I am not the litigious type. I feel like our society's desire to resolve every disagreement with legal action is part of what divides us.  That's why, when I was riding my bicycle and someone staring at his cell phone kicked open his door just as I passed, inadvertently sending me flying over it to the ground, and subsequently to the emergency room, I felt like I'd just let his and my insurance companies deal with it.  This was not a good plan.

My first warning came at the emergency room. An intern there, also a cyclist, told me he had the same attitude when he was "doored" (apparently that is the most common cycling accident) but that the other insurance company tried to cheat him so he had to get a lawyer.  Later, when I took my broken bike to the shop (it was totaled), the guys there also told me I would ultimately need a lawyer. Lucky for me, they had cards there from Cohen Law Partners-- (they all had used them and were very pleased). I took the card but still thought I wouldn't need them.

Then I got a call from the other guy's insurance company.  Shortly after starting to interview me they asked what part of the door I hit. I didn't know, as it all happened so fast, but I asked why that mattered. They said it would allow them to assign blame-- even though the guy who doored me immediately took responsibility. I said goodbye and called Josh Cohen.

Josh, also a cyclist, was great. From start to finish he was there with answers and, just as importantly, wise counsel. He understood my reluctance to sue but also let me know how much I was at risk financially. His guidance and follow through allowed me to get reimbursed  for all my medical bills (which were much larger than I'd anticipated) along with money for the work I'd missed, physical therapy, and some small compensation for the enormous pain and frustration.  He was also a BLAST TO TALK TO.  Just a great guy.

There came a time, near the end, where we could have gone for more, but I felt the settlement we had was fair and just. Josh and I discussed possible next steps, and he was happy to take them. But he was also happy to consult with me and, listening to my concerns, agreed that, for me, we could stop there.

Josh and his firm are just the best; I always felt comfortable and welcome with them, and they really listen. AND they got me a perfect settlement. I'm off now to ride my brand new bike, but if you need a lawyer, you should call Cohen Law Partners.

The team at Cohen Law helped me and my husband tremendously after a devastating car accident which killed my dog and injured us both. They were kind and considerate and worked diligently to help us. I recommend them to anyone who has been in any sort of accident!

The team at CLP is very familiar with all the ins and outs of riding a bike in Los Angeles which is definitely not something that most legal firms in L.A. can say. The settlement I ended up getting more than covered all my troubles all thanks to the team at CLP, and they even waived their legal fees with my case being so cut-and-dried and the driver having minimal insurance. Highly highly recommend contacting Cohen Law Partners if you ever end up getting hit while on your bike in Los Angeles, or better yet add their contact info right now just in case. -Hunter

reviews.text:
Review for Josh Cohen Legal Partners

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Navigating the complex realm of legal challenges can be daunting. Yet, in my experience, Josh Cohen Legal Partners provided nothing short of exceptional representation. From the outset, they were not just lawyers - they were genuine partners in the truest sense of the word.

Accessibility is crucial during such tumultuous times. Josh Cohen's team exemplified this. No matter the hour or day, they were always available, providing invaluable guidance and support. Their personal approach made me feel like I wasn't just another client in a vast roster, but a top priority.

Competence is a term thrown around lightly, but the prowess showcased by this firm was in a league of its own. They delved deep into the intricacies of a case that can only be described as "challenging", proving their mettle every step of the way. In a landscape fraught with tough circumstances, their tactical strategies were unmatched, reflecting their depth of experience and knowledge.

What truly set Josh Cohen Legal Partners apart was their unwavering commitment. They weren't content with the status quo. They pushed boundaries, went the extra mile, and did everything within their power to ensure a full settlement was achieved. Their tenacity, combined with a strong sense of ethics, proved instrumental in our victory.

To anyone seeking unparalleled legal representation, I cannot recommend Josh Cohen Legal Partners enough. Their blend of professionalism, personal touch, and sheer dedication is a rarity in today's legal landscape. A heartfelt thank you to the entire team for standing by me and ensuring justice was served.

Josh Cohen is a caring individual and takes his time, during what is often a stressful and painful experience, to make sure that you are made as whole as is possible. The legal system is a quagmire and he, and the rest of his team, is knowledgeable, professional, and above all, kind. I would highly recommend them.

reviews.text: After being rear-ended and experiencing back/nerve issues, I decided I needed to look for an attorney. I did some research online and came across Cohen Law Partners. I immediately called and had the pleasure of speaking with Darren Reed. He was so helpful in answering all of my questions and told me to give it sometime and if the pain continued give him a call back. Maybe about a month or two later I reached out to him again as I was still experiencing pain. Right away he began working on my case. His biggest concern was always my health from day one and I’m grateful. He made what was a difficult situation for me an easier one. He is an amazing attorney who truly cares about his clients. I would recommend Cohen Law Partners to anyone who needs a GREAT attorney.

I was doored by a car in downtown LA while riding my bicycle. I really didn't know my rights or where to turn. Josh Cohen at Cohen Law Partners was an excellent representative. My case was against a Lyft driver. The Lyft insurance adjusters were pushy and found many excuses to avoid payment due to the injuries caused by the Lyft driver. Josh took that stress completely away. He explained my rights, my legal options, likely outcomes and recommended a path forward. He was very clear and straightforward. I felt as though he took my case seriously and got a settlement for me that was fair, reasonable and most importantly covered my damages plus more.

I hope I am never involved in another bicycle-car accident but if I am, I know who I will call.

I am more than happy to refer Cohen Law Partners to anyone needing a PI attorney. Unlike most of their clients, I am not a bicycle rider; I was hit by a car when walking across the street.

I was not planning to use an attorney -- I thought I could work our my reasonable request with the insurance company. (Hahahahahaha.) But after they denied my claim entirely, suggesting the accident was my fault, I didn't see a lot of choices.

The referral to Cohen Law Partners came through a very circuitous route. And since it was in the middle of the pandemic, everything had to be done by phone or email. Nonetheless, after a couple calls, I felt like Josh Cohen was genuinely a friend who not only cared about me, but was passionate about making sure I was taken care of. I was particularly impressed by his extensive knowledge of this field of law and how fast he grasped the issues of my case.

Knowing that these kinds of cases generally take a minimum of 2 years -- and that the pandemic was slowing things down even further, I was astounded and delighted when I received the maximum settlement available to me less than a year after starting with Cohen Law Partners.  And, at the end when there was a hitch with the payment from the insurance company, Josh's associate, Darren, handled it quickly.

This whole experience has been hassle-free for me and graceful. Couldn't be happier with Cohen Law Partners.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Laren! It was truly a pleasure representing you and meeting your wonderful family!

reviews.text:

reviews.text: Last year I was hit by a car on a routine bike ride. It was a scary experience and I didn’t know the next step to take to handle the pain that struck immediately. After an extensive search I landed on Cohen Law Partners because of their great reviews. I didn’t know how good they’d be, but I gave them a shot. Over the course of my case, they went above and beyond to not only communicate with me, but to make sure everything I needed was taken care of. The pandemic drew out the process, but they didn’t give up and they maintained their enthusiasm for my case the entire time. I hope to never be in this situation again, but if I am, Cohen Law Partner will be the first call I make.

The Cohen Law Partners, Joshua Cohen, Darren Reid and staff were truly professional, trustworthy, and provided me with best care.  I would strongly recommend them as I found them on Yelp.  Not only did they represent me in the unsurpassed manner, they provided me with HOPE, strength, and courage. I am truly blessed to find this astounding team. After being struck by a car, who was totally at fault, they also help me out tremendously in communicating with the insurance companies who tried to save money on their behalf.  In three words,  THEY HELP ME,  to coordinate the right help for my medical injuries which time was of the essence.  Their team was very transparent and  communicated with me with the right platform in communication; either on the phone, text message or email. I would strongly recommend them to anyone who has doubt and will broadcast their services to anyone who needs their assistance.

Josh Cohen helped me deal with being hit by a car at an intersection while riding my bike. I was knocked out, awoke in the ambulance, spent a night in the hospital, and was discharged 36 hours later with a bill of over $115,000.

Although the driver stopped to help, her insurance covered only the minimum amount allowed in California, $15,000. Fortunately I had a sufficient uninsured/under-insured driver clause in my policy, and the Los Angeles Bicycle Attorney presented a demand that was honored by my insurance company.

Still feeling some of the after-effects of my concussion and general battering, but I'm back on my bike and living life again happily at the age of 73. Onward... :-)
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks Charlie! It was a pleasure representing you! When do we ride?

reviews.text:
Josh did a great job closing my vehicle vs cyclist case. The accident itself was pretty straight forward and clear who was at fault, but that doesn't always translate well to the insurance companies when you're trying to reach a settlement to cover bills, lost wages, property damage, and mental and physical trauma. Enter Josh and his team. They worked very hard to ensure I received the best care throughout my long recovery, while keeping my stress level around expenses very low. Whenever I had questions or ideas for the case, Josh was there it listen, I was encouraged to be as active as possible in the case details and documentation which matched my A-type personality very well. The one thing I asked when I began working with Josh was full transparency and to always be informed when challenges arose, he honored that throughout the life of the case and it definitely helped us brainstorm how to move forward. Great teamwork and collaboration brought us to a settlement that ensured protection for my future treatment needs.
Josh is a cyclist himself, he know bike laws inside and out, and has a vast amount of amazing resources in LA. Although I hope you don't end up needing legal council for an accident like I did, if you do, I highly recommend Josh and his team.

reviews.text: My family and I recently endured a mental health crisis during which we needed legal assistance. When it came time for our hearing, Ricky was incredible and we won our case within 10 minutes. The judge even complimented him for how he handled the case. I could not have done this without them, and I'm so grateful for their assistance. If you are dealing with an illegal 5150 or 5250, do not hesitate to reach out to Lessem, Newstat, & Tooson.

reviews.text:
I write with deep gratitude for Lessem, Newstat & Tooson. A crisis with a family member required me to fly across the country with no notice. It was incredibly serious—a mental health case, with my beloved facing six felony charges related to interactions with police.

The moment I read about this firm—and Jeremy in particular—I called multiple times. It was the weekend, but first thing Monday, Arianna, the rock star paralegal, returned my call and answered every single question. By Tuesday, we were sitting with Jeremy and Jamal. What a huge relief! I couldn’t see my beloved because he was in hospital custody, but Jamal visited him that very day.

From the start, Jeremy laid out a plan for mental health diversion, explaining (many times) what to expect. There were moments—many—when I wanted to speed things up, when fear took over. Every time, Jeremy patiently walked me through the process again. I asked the same question over and over, and each time, he responded as if it were the first time, with clarity and care. He gave no false hopes but remained confident in the plan.

Almost a year later, we got the outcome we had been hoping and praying for. There are still criteria to meet, and it will be a while before it is completely done, but the scariest and most difficult part is behind us.

A special word about Arianna—every time I had a question, she responded, and quickly. She was compassionate, reassuring, and always did her best to calm my fears. Maybe I shouldn’t share this, but when my nerves got the best of me, I even texted her on weekends—and she still got right back to me!

This was our first and, prayerfully, last experience with the legal system. It was stressful every single day, but I cannot imagine going through it without this team. One of our desired outcomes was an expert legal team—exceptionally skilled, unwavering in confidence, clear, compassionate, always several steps ahead, and aligned with my beloved’s highest good. And that’s what we received.

I also want to mention Taryn, an associate who joined the case a few months ago—smart, confident, patient with all my questions, knowledgeable, quick, and always a delight, with a warm smile and infectious laugh.

Thank you, Lessem, Newstat & Tooson. If you are looking for a criminal defense firm that truly understands mental health law, I wholeheartedly recommend Jeremy Lessem.

I cannot say enough good things about Mr. Lessem and his team.  They are highly responsive, smart, compassionate and...most importantly.... they got the job done quickly and efficiently. They are A+ in every regard. I would recommend them again and again. Look no further, you are in good hands with Lessem, Newstat & Tooson.
Jeremy lessem is not qualified to handle criminal case work

Words cannot fully express the gratitude I feel for Jeremy and Arianna. They helped represent my family when we got caught up in a legal health matter. The first night I spoke to Arianna, she informed me of my rights and told me that the hospital was breaking the law. They worked with me every step of the way and we won against all odds. They were so attentive that Jeremy even stepped away from a big event one evening to speak with me and help me feel better.

When random things happen to a family, and you are going up against large government agencies, you can feel super helpless. Jeremy and Arianna helped my family stand up to bad people and win. I will forever be indebted to them.
Took my money and did nothing!
Money hungry , not a great service!
Jeremy is more interested in collecting your money rather than providing good services.

I hired Jamal “J” Tooson in October 2021 and fired him in September 2022. I waited until after my case was resolved with my new, competent attorney to write this review to compare the experiences. I would have been better off with a public defender rather than waste thousands of dollars with Jamal and endure extreme hostility and shocking unprofessionalism during the most stressful year of my life.

I contacted Lessem, Newstat, & Tooson because they listed mental health expertise on their website. A mental health crisis resulted in an arrest in June 2021 and I sought out lawyers with experience in this particular matter. I initially spoke to Jeremy Lessem and perhaps I would’ve had a different experience if he ended up being my attorney. It became evident early on that Jamal had no interest in anything other than bragging about himself. Yet he lacked the social and professional capital to garner respect among the court's judges and other attorneys. I had no less than 8 court dates and Jamal failed to show up for all except maybe two or three. I would wait for hours for my case to be called and random attorneys I had never seen or spoken to would dial into the court for one continuation after another. During the one time I saw him in his office, Jamal arrived late and spent most of the time proofreading the motion and answering private phone calls regarding family matters. He had a random attorney I never met write the motion that was submitted and had me pay hundreds of dollars to see a doctor who wrote an ineffective and pointless report that did not help my case. The motion was weak and the DA ultimately used what Jamal submitted against me.

Each interaction with Jamal became increasingly aggressive as he did nothing over the months, to the point where I ended calls in tears due to him literally screaming into the phone. The last straw for me was when he claimed to have a beneficial professional relationship with someone who would be able to help my case (let’s call him Mr. X) and that he’d call Mr. X to discuss. Weeks after stating this and after he declined my call as I walked out of the courthouse since he did not show up, I texted him asking if he had spoken to Mr. X and said that it felt like it would be too late at this point. He called back after reading my text to scream about my “tone” and that he supposedly had been calling Mr. X and could not get a call back. He was so belligerent that the other attorneys who were walking out of the courthouse for their lunch break stopped to stare and waited until he was off the phone to ask me if I was okay.

This behavior is appalling in general but it was disgusting to see it from someone who boasts expertise with mental health matters on his website. At this point, my friend who helped me pay for Jamal’s fees asked what had been done for my case and since I didn’t want to call back screaming Jamal, I asked his paralegal. She immediately forwarded the call to Jamal who once again, started yelling about how the question of what had been done so far was “passive-aggressive” in an unhinged manner.

Several days after Jamal’s abusive conversations, I moved onto my current attorney and I received excellent service since. While Jamal screamed about my “tone”, my current attorney addressed every one of my questions respectfully and also took the time to ask me questions over the course of several in-office appointments to help deepen his knowledge of my case. While Jamal screamed about how he left “countless” calls to Mr. X, that Mr. X must not be calling him back because he simply did not care about the matter, my current attorney got Mr. X on the phone within one day to have an insightful discussion. The new attorneys were present for every court date and ultimately had my case diverted out of criminal court with an excellent motion supported by several mental health experts.

Retaining Jamal Tooson was the single most exacerbating and traumatic part of the crisis.
We’ve called at least 4 times and did a full intake with someone over the phone yet no one returned our calls.  It’s been over 3 weeks now.  If you can’t help us, at least tell us that

Jeremy, Ricky, and Arianna,

I will be forever grateful for your tenacity to seek justice for me !
I could not have asked for a better team to navigate me through a very stressful time.
Thank you for believing in me and for fearlessly fighting for the full DISMISSAL of my case.
You are truly the A team.

My case was rare, not very common, but with the right lawyers Lessem Newstat &Tooson I had a team a caring and reliable trust worthy team, but most importantly a winning “TEAM” they didn’t just take care of my case they took care of me they answered my questions. They answered my phone calls. They answered my prayers

Attorneys J Tooson and Jeremy Lessem saved my life!  I was wrongly accused of sexual harassment by someone who was trying to exploit me.  Jamal and Jeremy took the matter very seriously, were vigorous advocates on my behalf, took my calls at all hours of the day and really made me feel like a priority.  Despite what I was being told by the complaining party regarding the evidence against me, Jamal and Jeremy were able to establish my innocence and convinced the prosecutor to dismiss my case.  I am beyond grateful for Mr. Tooson and Mr. Lessem and they will always be my first call if I or someone I know needs legal assistance!!

reviews.text: Mr. Kamarian is a godsend, words can’t even express how he and his team were able to help my family and I out. A commercial truck crashed into my vehicle while my family and I were about to exit a gas station on our way to Disneyland. We went from excitement to sudden fear as it felt as if a monster truck was about to crush the whole right side of my vehicle on my two kids sat in the back I honked for my life just kept my hand on my horn until the driver stopped. I figured it was an open & shut case but to my surprise the attorney at the time drop my case stating the commercial truck had a dash cam and I ran into this truck. I was told I have a year to find an attorney who is willing to take on this case. My wife and I were thinking the worst after speaking with 10 different attorneys, and no one wanted to take on the case. Until we met Mr. Kamarian. Mr.Kamarian and his team right away made us feel welcomed like family. Mr. Kamarian asked me what happened that day as I begin to explain and show him photos and shared that the attorney was stating I ran into this into this truck. Mr. Kamarian stopped me and said there’s no way you ran into this truck pointed out the damages on my vehicle. Also adding the amount of speed needed is impossible due to the lack of space at the gas station. Mr. Kamarian also explained to me that there are three ways to win a case which they all pay the same, and most attorneys are looking for the open & shut cases where there is little to no work needed, Mr. Kamarian told me he is ready to fight for us and go to court if need be. It was like a huge weight lifted from my shoulders and I highly recommend Mr. Kamarian and his team to everyone that I meet because of my own personal experience. I know there are very few  Attorneys like Mr. Kamarian needless to say we won our case in which  my Wife and I received a very large settlement thanks to the team at Kamarian Law.

reviews.text: I was previously with another law firm and my case had basically gone cold. After being transferred to the Injury Law Firm, everything changed. They were proactive, communicative, and truly cared about getting results. My case was resolved with a settlement that exceeded my expectations. Jonathan was especially amazing — friendly, professional, and very supportive throughout the entire process.I would highly recommend their team to anyone needing dedicated and results-driven representation.
This attorney office doing a great job for any kind of injury lawsuit, and I am happy with them and I definitely recommend the injury law firm to friends and family.

I want to start by saying that The Injury Law Firm, LLP helped me tremendously after my car accident. Their team promptly arranged physical therapy for my injury, scheduled expert MRI imaging, and ensured I was evaluated by the appropriate medical professionals. Throughout the process, the attorneys worked diligently on my case and kept me informed every step of the way.

Although the case required time due to insurance procedures and extensive documentation, they handled all paperwork professionally and efficiently. Thanks to their efforts, they were able to secure a settlement of up to $7,000 for my incident after covering the costs of physical therapy, MRI services, and medical evaluations. Their attention to detail and dedication truly eased the stress of an already difficult situation.

If you are involved in a car accident and need reliable legal representation, I highly recommend The Injury Law Firm, LLP in Burbank. They are knowledgeable, responsive, and genuinely advocate for their clients.

The injury law firm was prompt in communicating with me, informing clear updates, were available to answer my questions at any time and returned calls. I felt like a human not just a case to them. The whole process was smooth and an easy process during a difficult time.

If you’re looking for a lawyer after a car accident, stop searching. The Injury Law Firm is the one. I was referred here after another firm couldn’t take my case, and I’m so grateful they did. Nicole, John, and Marylin were incredible throughout the entire process.

My case was complicated because the at-fault party tried to blame me, and their insurance was unprofessional and difficult to deal with. They tried to undervalue my BMW by pricing it as a basic model and offering me less money by claiming they weren’t going to keep my car. Nicole stepped in, fought back, and made sure I received a full and fair payout.

Nicole also made sure I was comfortable with the medical providers, and Marylin kept me informed every step of the way. I truly felt like I mattered as a client. I highly recommend The Injury Law Firm, they are professional, dedicated, and genuinely care about their clients.
Marilyn is very kind and I'm grateful because she always kept me updated on how my case was going. I would recommend them 👍 I had two cases with them, thank you.

Jon Sargsyan is the kind of attorney everyone hopes to find—but rarely does. His compassion, responsiveness, and dedication made an overwhelming and painful process feel manageable, and for that, I am deeply grateful.

Before finding Jon, I had worked with two other law firms and felt unheard and unsupported. From the moment Jon took on my case, everything changed. He took the time to understand not just the legal details, but me and what I had been through. He believed in my story and fought tirelessly on my behalf.

What truly set Jon apart was his accessibility. He personally returned my calls, emails, and texts—something that is incredibly rare. During moments when I was overwhelmed or struggling, he took extra time to listen, explain things clearly, and offer reassurance. That level of empathy and communication made an enormous difference throughout a long and challenging process.

Jon was not only a strong legal advocate, but a steady and compassionate presence from start to finish. I also want to acknowledge Nicole Cointreau, his partner, who was wonderful to work with as well.

If you are looking for an attorney who genuinely cares, communicates consistently, and will fight for you every step of the way, I highly recommend Jon Sargsyan at The Injury Law Firm, LLP.

— Erica Sanchez
Jon and Nicole are amazing! They kept me in tune with the process and made everything smooth and easy. Highest recommendation.

I found The Injury Law Firm LLP after an incident caused by blatant negligence from a stubborn business owner who refused to take responsibility. From day one, Joh stood out as the calm, commanding force I desperately needed.
He handled every twist with unmatched patience and precision. The owner dragged their feet, and played every delay tactic imaginable—yet Joh never wavered. His responses were lightning-fast, always clear, and laser-focused on strategy. No fluff, no false promises—just steady, expert guidance that kept me grounded through months of frustration.
What truly sets Joh apart is his relentless determination. Joh didn’t flinch,and negotiated with surgical skill until we secured the settlement I deserved.
The Injury Law Firm LLP mirrors Joh’s professionalism: organized, discreet, and always one step ahead. If you’re facing a tough personal injury battle, Joh and this firm are your best shot at justice. I walked away not just compensated, but genuinely impressed. Thank you, Joh—you’re a rare gem in this field.

I am extremely satisfied personally and professionally. They always took care of me with a great attitude and great professionalism and always got back to me when thy said they would on time.
I highly recommend them and I am very thankful for all the attention and care they gave me.

I am very impressed by the short amount of time it took for The Injury Law Firm to complete and settle my case. My case was very complicated due to the custom insurance auto plan I had. They genuinely handled my case with the upmost respect and care and I appreciate them for that! Jon and Marylin are amazing & I would HIGHLY recommend them for auto accidents or injuries!

They’ve done such a great job for me. I had all my treatments with Chiro treatments. They’ve got a settlement for my car and I was able to keep my car and received a second settlement all because of Marilyn I strongly suggest injury, law firm, just ask for Marilyn. She knows what she’s doing. she kept up with me through this whole situation she was great on informing me with everything. Thank you, Marilyn.

I was referred to Jon, his amazing paralegal Marilyn, and the rest of his firm by a colleague at work after I was involved in a high speed rear end collision that left me with extensive back injuries and a totaled my car.

Jon’s team had me in a reputable doctor’s office and physical therapy within 24 hours after my accident. Not only did Marilyn take care of setting up all my appointments (so many that I lost count), she found outstanding providers close by since I was injured and not ready to drive again.

Jon and Marilyn worked quickly to file my complaint against the other driver. Then came discovery, which is normally where a case (painfully) slows down to a point where it feels like it’s not moving along at all. However, this was not the case working with Marilyn and Jon. They were EXTREMELY efficient in how they collected all the information they needed from me to complete discovery (SROGS, form rogs etc) and they did it so quickly!! Additionally, Jon and Marilyn were incredibly responsive throughout my claim. My phone calls did not go to voicemail once, Jon or Marilyn always picked up and took the time to answer any questions I had.

In what felt like a blink of an eye after my accident, Jon and Marilyn obtained the max insurance payout/settlement for my case. I would recommend hiring Jon and his team at the Injury Law Firm a thousand times over.

Thank you Jon and Marilyn, I hope I never NEED to hire you again since that would mean I got into an accident, but your firm will be the only injury law firm I recommend people to hire :)
They did a great job keeping me informed along the whole process. Very kind and professional firm.

First of all, honesty and trust is what everybody deserves to get that and it’s hard in this world, but John has those qualities in him and his team. I spoke to Marilyn and she was so smooth and communicative and patient and understanding.
I recommend people to them for their professionalism and authenticity.

It was through finding Eduard Braun and his associates including his fabulous team and Evelyn especially that I was not only helped…. I was listened to, understood, respected, guided, and held in a sensitive and caring way as a human through this unfortunate circumstance.  They stepped up and had my back EVERY step of the way.  They are like family who genuinely care about YOU as a person.  They do everything in their power to make sure you get healed and the help you need and the compensation that you deserve when you have been the victim of an unfortunate accident.  I could not have gotten to the other side of my accident without their help.  They were the best team of true and CARING professionals I could have asked for.  I’m so appreciative of their assistance and I will be forever grateful to them and KINDNESS does matter in situations like this and they are genuinely kind and understanding. reviews.text:
The biggest mistake I have done in 2024. I called Tofer & Associates about my Porsche car accident insurance claim. Told them I was offered already by Progressive Ins. $5,000. Already Approved and ready to send me.
Tofer & Associates assured me that I can get $30K or more. They sent me for so many medical appointments, tests, chiropractor visits, Physical therapies, MRI.
More than 50 times. Some every other day.
Driving up to 50 miles on some medical appointments.
22 months later almost 2 years they finally said they got an offer. Ill get $5000. Not a penny more than the original offer made by Progressive. I did not accept it.
2 months later called me again offered the same amount $5K.  $5K does not even pay for my gas and time going to those appintments. Threathened me that if I dont accept it they mentioned some legal practices that they can go on and accept it without me accepting it. That If I go to another Law firm they will charge me for the time they spend on my case.
I finally accepted the offer.  Just to end up all these inconviences.
Tofer & Associates is the kind of insurance company that we all want to avoid. They will give you all the high expectations you want to hear. They are experts on deceiving clients.
They have good reviews which I believe are mostly fake clients.  DONT EVEN CONSIDER THEM. THEY ARE DISHONEST AND CANNOT BE TRUSTED. DONT MAKE THE SAME MISTAKE I DID. THEY CANT HELP.
I want to give them ZERO in review for not achieving anything for 2 years but its not available.

I highly recommend Attorney Mike Cholodenko and his assistant, Cynthia Pawla at Toffer & Associates for their outstanding help with my personal injury case.

Mike came highly recommended to me through a friend of a friend, and I’m so grateful for that referral. Although he is partly retired, he still takes cases through referrals, and his more than 40 years of experience clearly show. Mike is no-nonsense, straightforward, and was always available when I had questions or concerns. I truly trusted his judgment and appreciated his deep knowledge and professionalism throughout the process. I believe his long-standing relationships with insurance companies also helped secure a positive outcome in my case.

Cynthia Pawla was equally wonderful to work with. She was kind, responsive, and made sure everything moved along smoothly. It’s clear that both Mike and Cynthia genuinely care about their clients and the work they do.

If you are looking for experienced, trustworthy legal representation, I strongly recommend Toffer & Associates, and especially Attorney Mike Cholodenko and Cynthia Pawla.

Don is not the first lawyer I hired to represent me in the two divorce cases my ex started against me. But, he is the one who listened, who cared, who actually did what he said he would do for me.

I waited through four years and tens of thousands of dollars just to have my day...my say...in court.

No lawyer can promise you an outcome. But, Don did promise that he would be a "bulldog" for me. He believed in me and my case and said he would see it through until we got the result I was aiming for.

And he did.

I was extremely disillusioned by the Los Angeles and San Bernardino courts and judges I originally saw and also by the lawyer that I originally had. No one would listen to me, neither judge wanted to hear my case. It was a nightmare.

The legal road since hiring Don hasn't always been a smooth one. But he's been there every step of the way, guiding me, answering my questions, explaining things to me. And, in the end, he got it all done!

For me, it felt like Don really cared about me and my case. He wasn't there to be my friend and he would tell me things straight up, even if it wasn't what I was hoping to hear. But, he's the best darn lawyer I could've asked for. And I do consider him a friend.

reviews.text:
🔻Looking for a Personal Injury Attorney?🔻

Call The Law Offices of Edward Y. Lee.

If you’re currently seeking legal representation for a personal injury case, I strongly recommend Attorney Edward Y. Lee:
a USC Law graduate, member of the National Top 100 Trial Lawyers, and a seasoned professional who has been practicing since 1995. His firm is responsive, ethical, and experienced in handling complex cases with integrity and care.

As for Setareh Law Group, I will be posting the first part of my honest review after my case officially settles. For now, please take this referral as early insight into my negative experience with their firm, which includes unprofessional conduct, unqualified staff, and questionable lien agreements that allow them to maintain control over a client’s settlement even late in the process.

Unfortunately, I must delay my full review due to concerns about potential retaliation, as Setareh Law Group still controls important aspects of my outcome through their contractual structure. But let this short post serve as a 🚨 WARNING 🚨 : I would not recommend them to anyone. I wouldn’t even give them 1 star , but I had to in order to post this review .

⚠️ P.S. Sonia, who was one of the worst case managers I had to deal with, no longer works for Setareh Law Group — and unfortunately, she hasn’t been replaced with anyone better. The ongoing turnover and lack of qualified staff only add to the chaos and poor client experience this firm delivers.

I wish I had gone to Edward Y. Lee from the start.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We sincerely apologize that your experience with us has not met your expectations.

We acknowledge the statement regarding the employee mentioned in your review, and we can confirm that they are no longer with our firm. Our team is committed to ensuring that your currently assigned case manager is able to address any and all concerns you may have as we enter the final stages of your case.

Unfortunately, because your review does not include a name, it is difficult for us to identify your case and connect with you directly. However, we would greatly appreciate the opportunity to communicate with you further so we can resolve any issues and ensure that your remaining steps with us are positive and seamless.
Please feel free to reach out to us directly so we can address your concerns and
provide you with the best possible experience moving forward.

And I didn't have to pay anything because he got his fees from the car company. He was so easy to deal with, and so knowledgable. He answered all my questions thoroughly so I wasn't stressed, and the process was effortless. Look no further. You won't be disappointed. :)

I’d love to take out the opportunity in expressing my Gratitude to this wonderful firm.

I want to add I was skeptical at first as there are so many companies that make false promises. Well not this firm.

They helped me from beginning till end in assisting me with my case. They’re very professional, experienced, proactive, and certainly quick on taking care of their clients.

I can’t thank them enough for their wonderful, deliverance in a speedy and great recovery of my case.

Ms. Ford

Well our case was a few years old and so many other attorneys had turned us down and said that they couldn't help us but this firm proved them wrong and we got Justice for the wrongdoing on us by a company and we are so grateful in every way and if we ever needed an attorney for anything again this firm is definitely the first ones I will call no one they are far away that is okay I am in the Sacramento area but I just want to give everybody in the staff at the firm a two thumbs up👍👍

This review is for Ellen at Stepanyan Law.
I began working with Ellen about a year ago for my Land Rover that kept giving me problems, such as the wheel locking while on drive and overheating. I was skeptical at first and did not know Lemon was an option. I met Ellen through networking and she offered to take care of my car’s situation. I trusted her and she did not settle for anything less than the day I reported these issues to the manufacturer. The case was handled and closed only a few months later and everything went smoothly. The bonus; it was such an easy process and didn’t require much of my time! Thank you, Ellen!

I would like to thank Simon Stepanyan again for everything he did for our case. He is genuinely a great attorney who is very analytical and purposeful in his job. What else do you need when you call Stepanyan Oganesyan law firm?!!

Awesome Lawyers. They took my case when no one else would.  Ellen gave me hope and produced an excellent outcone. Ellen is patient and compassionate and has strong representation.  From start to finish Ellen was kind, understanding,  and she fought for what was right and fair. Everything was handled in a timely manner. Phone calls or an email was always returned promptly. I'm very appreciative of her help and all her patience, seriously she has the patience of an angel, but is awesome at what she does. Thank you Ellen! I definitely recommend this Lawyers firm. They cover different area's of the law, so if you have any needs definitely give them a call. Again Thank you  Ellen!
This law firm is amazing! Their services were outstanding and very professional. My settlement was reached fairly quickly and I was very satisfied with their work. I highly recommend this law firm.

When I was sold a vehicle that was a certified pre-owned only to find out that it was in an accident that wasn’t disclosed to me, I immediately sought legal counsel to help me understand my rights and fight for me. I worked with Ellen on my case and the process took over a year, but Ellen worked hard to get me the outcome I wanted. I won my case thanks to her tireless efforts. I highly recommend this law firm.

Ellen Oganesyan

We heartily endorse the law firm of Stepanyan, Oganesyan, LLP.    We recently purchased a used car and after having it examined by a car dealership, determined to our chagrin, that there were were serious mechanical problems that should have been fixed or disclosed.   While I am a retired lawyer and retired Municipal Court Judge, I was not familiar with California law, and so I was completely at sea when it came how to deal with the problem.

I turned to the internet for guidance and located the firm of Stepanyan and Oganesyan.  What transpired was highly successful for us.  They were most concerned, competent and pleasant to deal with.   They were able to negotiate a settlement with the lawyers for the dealership that sold us the car that was highly satisfactory.

Contract issues with the sale of used automobiles is a highly specialized field—and these lawyers had a solid grasp of how to handle the case.  As a practicing attorney for over 50 years I have a sense of what good lawyering is, and they were honest, fair, straightforward and knowledgeable.  If you have a used car sale problem, this is the firm you should contact.

Allan and Cheryl
Los Angeles

reviews.text: After a truck accident, I was overwhelmed by insurance claims, medical bills, and everything else. I called Pathway Law Firm and they took care of it all. They handled all the legal stuff, kept me informed, and made sure I didn’t have to worry. It was a big relief.

Pathway Law Firm stayed consistent throughout my case. The information I received early on matched how things actually played out, which I really appreciated.
What stood out to me was how clearly Pathway explained my options. They didn’t push one direction but made sure I understood the pros and cons before deciding.
The team at Pathway Law Firm was respectful of my time. Appointments were on schedule, and calls were returned within a reasonable timeframe. Everything felt professional and organized.
Pathway made sure I understood paperwork before asking me to sign anything. Nothing felt rushed or glossed over. That level of explanation isn’t something I’ve experienced elsewhere.

One thing I liked about Pathway Law Firm was that communication didn’t drop off after the initial intake. They continued to check in and explain updates as things progressed, which helped with peace of mind.

I appreciated how approachable everyone at Pathway was. Every conversation felt professional but not stiff. I never felt uncomfortable asking questions, even when I needed clarification more than once.

Pathway Law Firm handled my case in a calm, steady way. There were no big promises or pressure to rush decisions. Instead, they explained what was realistic and what wasn’t. That honesty helped build trust early on.

What stood out about Pathway was how organized everything felt. Documents were explained before being sent, questions were answered directly, and updates were consistent. I didn’t feel like I had to chase anyone down for information. It felt like a well-run office.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Records indicate you hired a different attorney in 2024.
And that new attorney settled your case in 2025
It also appears from the records on the court website - you declined the opportunity to continue with your case and go before a Judge

Also, generally - a lawyer does not ‘create’ medical reports and the case value is determined by the neutral doctor (called a QME). So while the court record indicates that you were actually successful in a settlement for money in your favor, the value of that settlement would be determined by the doctors.
Seems a bit unreasonable to leave a bad review two years after you left to be represented by another attorney. And then settled your case successfully.

reviews.text:
I first heard of The Shamsi Law Firm APC through my brother as he searched for an attorney after my car accident on December 2022.

I got in contact with the law firm two days after the accident and I left an inquiry online. They immediately got back to me and started the process with an assessment and the paperwork. I informed them I had a recording of the accident captured by a dash cam and shared my results from my visit to the ER.

I began receiving medical services ASAP and I was first sent to a chiropractor and completing CT scans/MRIs. In between I was changed case managers, thankfully I was assigned to Ms. Sofia Muradyan. At the time of getting reassigned I was going through a difficult time in my life in addition to the accident, she was a true active listener and genuinely provided support to get through appointments with the specialist to continue treatment for aqua therapy and reevaluations. She even would listen to my request to change specialist if unsatisfied with a location/service and she ensured I received the type of treatment I preferred. She was easy to stay in communication with and always returned calls/emails. She was patient and flexible with her time to properly stay in contact to get through the process, including fixing an issue with the DMV. If I would've had her assigned to my case from the beginning, I would've felt inclined to asked for a new referral to see a different chiropractor and I wouldn't had dealt with an issue from the DMV.

Although my case hasn't been finalized, I would highly recommend to ask for Sofia, she's integral part of the team with an exceptional work ethic, she always so professional and organized. She was really the reason I got through the tough times, this is why I'm giving a 5/5 to this law firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Understood. From now on, **every response will end with**:

Sean Shamsi

We are especially grateful for your kind words about Sofia. She is an integral part of our team, and your feedback reflects exactly the level of care, patience, and dedication she brings to her work. Making sure our clients receive the treatment they are comfortable with, feel heard, and stay informed is extremely important to us. We are glad her communication, flexibility, and support helped you through both the medical process and personal challenges.

Even though your case is still ongoing, we truly appreciate your trust and your recommendation. We remain committed to fighting to protect your rights and being here for you every step of the way.

Sean Shamsi
